# optionOnScreenBelowWindow | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Graphics ](/documentation/coregraphics)

- [ CGWindowListOption ](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowlistoption)

-  optionOnScreenBelowWindow 

Type Property# optionOnScreenBelowWindow

Mac CatalystmacOS

```
static var optionOnScreenBelowWindow: CGWindowListOption { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowlistoption/optiononscreenbelowwindow#Discussion)

List all windows that are currently onscreen and in behind the window specified in the `relativeToWindow` parameter. Windows are returned in order from front to back.
